chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No.S-625 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.4121/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection Nos.1 and 26 as at “A” 3. For orders on CMA No.4122/2022 (Exp/A) 4. For hearing of main case -------------------------------- 05.07.2022 Mr. Zahid Hussain Laghari, advocate for the petitioner ------------------------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Deferred. 4. Heard argument. Perused record. The petitioner by way of instant petition has mainly prayed that the official respondents to be punished and they be directed not to register any FIR against him without permission of this Court. None could be punished by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. While registration of an FIR being legal course could hardly be conditioned with permission of this Court. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. J U D G E
